race.comment: ENTICING (6) sat handy here last start and was far too good, pulling away late to score by 2.2L under Faithfull. He rises in weight, but this looks to set up similarly from a good draw. Can prove his last start was no fluke and repeat the dose. DEEP DISCRETION (5) jumped favourite ahead of ENTICING last start and was poised to strike in the run, though he was no match for him late. Gets a weight swing in his favour today and it wouldn't surprise to see him turn the tables. UNDERCOVER SNIPER (9) finished off nicely from a long way back over 1100m here last start and looks set for this. Fiore rides now, replacing the apprentice hoop and while the draw is sticky, she looks a leading chance with improvement on the cards. SALVADO (14) couldn't repeat the dose behind a smart one last start that runs in the Abrolhos. Can go one better despite the wide alley. GOLD VANCOUVER (2) draws better now second-up and can feature in the finish.
